name: cc2codex-migration-assistant
description: Import a Claude Code setup into Codex with a safe preview, plain-language guidance, and optional advanced migration tools.

interface.shortDescription: Bring your Claude Code setup into Codex with a safe preview first.
interface.longDescription: Helps people moving from Claude Code to Codex import their instructions, skills, and connected tools with a safe preview, plain-language explanations, and a guided finish step.
defaultPrompt: Help me bring my Claude Code setup into Codex.
Preview my Codex setup before changing anything real.
Explain what will change and what I may need to reconnect.
